mapper.insert: INSERT INTO peer_review_assignments (assignment_id, reviewer_id, submission_id, status) VALUES (#{assignmentId}, #{reviewerId}, #{submissionId}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM peer_review_assignments WHERE reviewer_id = #{reviewerId} ORDER BY status, assigned_at
mapper.update: UPDATE peer_review_assignments SET status = #{status} WHERE pra_id = #{praId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM peer_review_assignments WHERE assignment_id = #{assignmentId}
SELECT pra.* FROM peer_review_assignments pra JOIN submissions s ON pra.submission_id = s.submission_id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId} AND pra.status = 'completed' ORDER BY pra.assigned_at DESC
